name: Hautes-Alpes (France)
description: Per pale: at the hoist, red with a gold Occitan cross; at the fly, silver with a red dolphin (for the Dauphiné); over all a blue chief strewn with gold fleurs-de-lis — the arms of the département of Hautes-Alpes.
history: Combines the Occitan cross of the south with the dolphin of the Dauphiné, beneath a fleur-de-lis chief for France.

features.role: per pale — red (Occitan cross) at the hoist, silver (dolphin) at the fly
a red dolphin, for the Dauphiné
a blue chief strewn with gold fleurs-de-lis
